name: flutter-mvvm-devkit
description: Develop Flutter MVVM apps with template generation, sealed navigation, PM previews, inspector workflows, APIs, and mock services.

interface.shortDescription: Build Flutter MVVM apps with templates, inspector workflows, APIs, mocks, and PM previews.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills and generator assets for Flutter MVVM application work: new app templates, reusable base views, sealed page navigation, common alert/action sheet UI, running-app widget inspection through Dart MCP, formal feature development, API service/model workflows, mock API scaffolding, and product-manager UI preview workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $flutter-mvvm-template to create a Flutter MVVM app.
Use $flutter-mvvm-feature-dev to add a formal Flutter MVVM feature.
Use $flutter-mvvm-pm-ui to add an isolated product-manager UI preview.
Use $flutter-mvvm-inspector to connect Dart MCP and locate the source for a selected Flutter widget.
